scripts.check: tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --pretty false
scripts.format: biome format --write --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown=true src/App.tsx src/api src/components src/features src/lib src/routes src/styles src/types/domain.ts src/types/jsx.d.ts src/utils tests *.ts package.json
scripts.lint: biome lint --skip=a11y/useSemanticElements --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown=true src/App.tsx src/api src/components src/features src/lib src/routes src/styles src/types/domain.ts src/types/jsx.d.ts src/utils tests *.ts package.json
scripts.generate-client: cd ../backend && uv run python -m scripts.export_openapi ../frontend/openapi.json && cd ../frontend && openapi-ts
